subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Verily, God loveth faithfulness and in all conditions keepeth His gaze fixed upon it. Be thou not saddened by that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی حق وفا را دوست داشته در جمیع احوال باو ناظر است محزون مباش بانچه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @nearness to God
